scripts.build:rust-wasm: bun scripts/build-rust-wasm.ts && bun build src/runtime/rust-wasm-worker.ts --outfile dist/isometric-rust-worker.js --target browser --format esm && bun build src/isometric-rust-wasm-browser.ts --outfile dist/isometric-rust-wasm-browser.js --target browser --format esm
scripts.test: bun test src && cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --locked && cargo test --manifest-path rust/wasm/Cargo.toml --locked
